creator: villa.alberto@gmail.com
text:
libcdio, if installed WITH_PARANOIA, installs a japanese manpage too, which is not listed in the makefile

Fix: add jp to MANLANG

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/sysutils/libcdio && make install WITH_PARANOIA=yes && pkg_which /usr/local/man/jp/man1/cd-paranoia.1 -> result: ?
